description_long: This is a young adult male with a distinctive punk-inspired appearance, featuring a tall, spiked mohawk hairstyle. He is dressed in a casual, urban outfit consisting of a hooded jacket layered over a shirt, paired with slim-fit pants and athletic shoes. His facial expression is stern, and he has a lean build with visible cheekbones and a pointed chin. The jacket has a prominent hood and is worn open, revealing the shirt underneath. His arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and his hands are relaxed. The overall look is modern and edgy, suitable for a city or street environment.
description: A young adult male with a spiked mohawk, wearing a hooded jacket, slim pants, and athletic shoes in a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiked mohawk, facial features, open hooded jacket, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mohawk, nose, and the layered clothing silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded jacket, the mohawk's spikes, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mohawk profile and the side of the face and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded jacket over a shirt with slim-fit pants and athletic shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
